title: Country
questions: What are three things for which your country is famous?
What are the best natural wonders in your country?
What are the best man-made things in your country?
What is the best food in your country?
What do tourists like to see when visiting your country?
What 3 things your country has achieved in the last ten years? Why are those things important? How did your country complete those tasks?
What is best about your country's: Education system? Economy? Culture? People? Art?
How does the world view your country?
Does your country have many visitors each year? Why or why not?
How would you describe your country to a foreign friend?
What would you like to change about your country? Why?
